description: gravity_force uses G*m1*m2/r**2 and gravity_accel uses G*M/r**2 — note the distance is squared
times_weaker returns (r_far/r_near)**2 — doubling the distance makes gravity four times weaker
gravity_accel at Earth's surface comes out near 9.8, confirming the physics is right
Clear names (M, r, a), uses the provided G, and a return on every function
